title: Recovery Code Alpha
storyIntro: A.R.K. releases the first recovery sequence to test communication and discipline.
objective: Decode the first recovery code and report the base directive.
rules: Submit only after every member understands the clue.
clueText: The first human base survives by choosing to rebuild.

title: Water Line Protocol
storyIntro: The Outpost must secure its first shared resource before the system grants movement clearance.
objective: Organize a practical water plan and verify resource accountability with leaders.
clueText: Resources survive when everyone treats them as shared responsibility.

title: Boundary Scan
storyIntro: A.R.K. detects unstable movement near the assigned camp perimeter.
objective: Map the approved movement zone and identify the safe return point.
clueText: The safest team knows where freedom ends and responsibility begins.

title: Repair the Relay
storyIntro: The command relay fails during a simulated breach alert.
objective: Restore communication through practical problem-solving and organized roles.
clueText: A repair is complete only when it is safe, useful, and understood.

title: Human Override
storyIntro: A.R.K. requests one final proof that survival has a purpose beyond calculation.
objective: Submit the final phrase that defines the Outpost's reason to rebuild.
rules: The phrase must be chosen together.
Every Rover contributes to the final decision.
clueText: The answer is not efficiency. It is what makes survival worth protecting.
